blocks.prompt: The second 34 is coming in ten minutes. She's right here.

options.label: "Can I get your number? In case study hall runs late again."
You started to say it. Stopped. Found something else to talk about.
You told yourself you'd do it when she was getting up to leave. Then she got up to leave.
You didn't. The bus came and she said same time next Thursday and you said yeah.
